title: Modernish Retro
body:
That modpack trying to create very specific balance between old and new minecraft.
Imagen paralel universe where technologies was developed earlier in time, basically that visual of this modpack hehe.
The main stylish-changer mod is nastalgic-tweacks. 

Also here just a bunch of cool helpful mod for improving your gameplay or just some funny stuff :)

I'm not sure about continuation of support of this pack, but I will try do my best (ツ)
